title: MemirZabri's Mob Picker Mod
description: Have you ever wanted to imprison your friends and throw them into places? Thanks to this mod, you can take the players into an article and keep it in your inventory as you want!
body:
# Mob Picker Mod

Have you ever wanted to imprison your friends and throw them into places? Thanks to this mode, you can take the players into an article and keep it in your inventory as you want!

This Minecraft mod is the first mob picker mod. You can take the players into the "Mob Picker" item by hitting them with a left -click. If you want to leave the player, just right -click on one block.
